files.content:
---
import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

interface Props extends HTMLAttributes<"nav"> {}

const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props
---

<nav
  aria-label="breadcrumb"
  data-slot="breadcrumb"
  class={cn(className)}
  {...props}
>
  <slot />
</nav>
--- import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" interface Props extends HTMLAttributes<"li"> {} const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props ---

---
import type { HTMLTag, Polymorphic } from "astro/types"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

type Props<Tag extends HTMLTag = "a"> = Polymorphic<{ as: Tag }>

const { as: Tag = "a", class: className, ...props } = Astro.props as Props
---

<Tag
  data-slot="breadcrumb-link"
  class={cn("transition-colors hover:text-foreground", className)}
  {...props}
>
  <slot />
</Tag>
--- import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" interface Props extends HTMLAttributes<"span"> {} const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props ---

--- import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types" import { MoreHorizontal } from "@lucide/astro" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" interface Props extends HTMLAttributes<"span"> {} const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props --- svg]:size-4", className)} {...props} > More

export { default as Breadcrumb } from "./breadcrumb.astro"
export { default as BreadcrumbEllipsis } from "./breadcrumb-ellipsis.astro"
export { default as BreadcrumbItem } from "./breadcrumb-item.astro"
export { default as BreadcrumbLink } from "./breadcrumb-link.astro"
export { default as BreadcrumbList } from "./breadcrumb-list.astro"
export { default as BreadcrumbPage } from "./breadcrumb-page.astro"
export { default as BreadcrumbSeparator } from "./breadcrumb-separator.astro"
